subject: FW: Ergonomic Keyboard
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Cynthia Reed [mailto:cmr@falconfone.com] 
Sent: Friday, January 18, 2008 4:36 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Ergonomic Keyboard


Jeffrey asked me to try to find out the make and model of a white
ergonomic keyboard that I used to have.  My friends at our IT department
think it might have been the Microsoft Natural Keyboard Elite.
 

________________________________

From: HelpDesk [mailto:helpdesk@falconfone.com] 
Sent: Friday, January 18, 2008 4:26 PM
To: cmr@falconfone.com
Subject: Re: [Request ID :##5230##] : My other keyboard



Not sure, it might have been the Microsoft Natural Keyboard Elite.

- LBO

Description : You recently (well, within the last 6 months) got me a new
keyboard. But
someone wants to know the make/model of the other one (it was white, and
a
little more spready-outy)

Do you remember anything?
